# Ship 2 review fixture content item

Minimal content idea used by the loop-mvp-ship2 binary gate. Accepting this item should move it to `review/Ready/` and flip `review-action:` to `accepted`. Rejecting it should move the file to `Archive/review-archive/YYYY-MM-DD/`. Deferring it should tick a counter in `observer-defers.jsonl`.
